introSection: Vuoristorata is a wooden roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Vuoristorata is a clone of Rutschebanen at Bakken, the only difference being the height and length of the rides, with the ride being slightly taller and longer.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 4 trains with 4 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows, except for the back car which has 2, for a total of 22 riders per train.

fullText:
Vuoristorata is a wooden roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland.

Vuoristorata is a clone of Rutschebanen at Bakken, the only difference being the height and length of the rides, with the ride being slightly taller and longer.

4 trains with 4 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows, except for the back car which has 2, for a total of 22 riders per train.
